14	)
15	
16	// runBundleInlineMaxBytes is the per-file cap for inline content returned by
17	// runBundleFile. Files larger than this return truncated=true with no body so
18	// the client can fall back to a download path.
19	const runBundleInlineMaxBytes = 64 * 1024
20	
21	// runBundleInlineExtensions is the set of file extensions and exact filenames
22	// whose contents may be inlined (when also under the size cap). Anything
23	// outside this set is download-only.
24	var runBundleInlineExtensions = map[string]bool{
25		".txt":          true,
26		".md":           true,
27		"manifest.json": true,
28		"prompt.md":     true,
29		"result.json":   true,
30	}
31	
32	// errRunBundleOutsideRoot is returned by resolveRunBundlePath when the
33	// requested path canonicalises outside the run's bundle root.
34	var errRunBundleOutsideRoot = errors.New("run bundle: path outside bundle root")
35	
36	// runBundleRoot returns the canonical absolute filesystem path for the run's
37	// bundle directory, plus the project the run belongs to. The second return
38	// value is the project root; the third is true when a usable bundle exists.
39	func (s *ServerState) runBundleRoot(runID string) (bundleRoot, projectRoot string, ok bool) {
40		if runID == "" {
41			return "", "", false
42		}
43		for _, proj := range s.GetProjects(false) {
44			bundleID := bundleIDForRunID(proj.Path, runID)
45			if bundleID == "" {
46				continue
47			}
48			root := filepath.Join(proj.Path, agent.ExecuteBeadArtifactDir, bundleID)
49			info, err := os.Stat(root)
50			if err != nil || !info.IsDir() {
51				continue
52			}
53			// Canonicalize root so symlink-escape checks compare apples to apples.
54			canonical, err := filepath.EvalSymlinks(root)
55			if err != nil {
56				canonical = root
57			}
58			return canonical, proj.Path, true
59		}
60		return "", "", false
61	}
62	
63	// bundleIDForRunID maps a Run.id to its bundle directory name under
64	// .ddx/executions/, or "" when the run has no bundle.
65	//
66	// Three input shapes are recognized:
67	//   - "exec-<bundleID>"             → try-layer synthesised from bundle directory
68	//   - run-layer session ID with a BundlePath pointing under .ddx/executions/
69	//   - bundle ID directly (for caller convenience)
70	func bundleIDForRunID(projectRoot, runID string) string {
71		if strings.HasPrefix(runID, "exec-") {
72			return strings.TrimPrefix(runID, "exec-")
73		}
74		// Try resolving the run-layer session entry.
75		logDir := agent.SessionLogDirForWorkDir(projectRoot)
76		entry, ok, err := agent.FindSessionIndex(logDir, runID)
77		if err == nil && ok && entry.BundlePath != "" {
78			return bundleIDFromPath(entry.BundlePath)
79		}
80		return ""
81	}
82	
83	// bundleIDFromPath extracts the bundle directory leaf name from a BundlePath
84	// of the form ".ddx/executions/<bundleID>" or ".ddx/executions/<bundleID>/...".
85	func bundleIDFromPath(p string) string {
86		clean := filepath.ToSlash(p)
87		prefix := filepath.ToSlash(agent.ExecuteBeadArtifactDir) + "/"
88		idx := strings.Index(clean, prefix)
89		if idx < 0 {
90			return ""
91		}
92		rest := clean[idx+len(prefix):]
93		if i := strings.Index(rest, "/"); i >= 0 {
94			rest = rest[:i]
95		}
96		if !looksLikeBundleID(rest) {
97			return ""
98		}
99		return rest
100	}
